title: Extract a stateless card from inline markup
prompt:
Write lib/my_app_web/components/card.ex (module MyAppWeb.Card) with a function component card/1. Attrs: :class (string, default nil), :rest (:global). Slot: :inner_block (required). Render
{render_slot(@inner_block)}
. This is a component extraction — no events, no state.
tier_rationale: Single-step decomposition into a wrapping card. Canonical slotted component.
